task_completion.description: Add a transition, payload bay body tube, and nose cone to the rocket design.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the OpenRocket component tree, look for a 'Transition', a new 'Body tube' (payload bay), and a 'Nose cone' added to the upper section of the rocket.

task_completion.description: Include a 50g mass component inside the payload bay.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the OpenRocket component tree, look for a 'Mass component' placed inside the newly added payload bay body tube. The mass should be approximately 50g.

task_completion.description: Ensure a stability margin of at least 1.0 calibers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the OpenRocket design view, check the upper right corner for a stability margin reading of at least 1.0 cal.

task_completion.description: Verify the flight performance through simulation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the OpenRocket 'Flight simulations' tab, look for a completed simulation run with results such as peak altitude displayed.

task_completion.description: Save the modified design to hammerhead_rocket.ork.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the OpenRocket window title showing 'hammerhead_rocket.ork' or a file manager/terminal confirming the file was saved in /home/ga/Documents/rockets/.

task_completion.description: Write a retrofit report documenting the modifications and simulation results.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor open with 'hammerhead_report.txt' containing the payload bay dimensions (>=50mm diameter, >=100mm length), the 50g mass, the final stability margin, and the simulated peak altitude.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenRocket GUI to modify the rocket.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the OpenRocket application interface, not just a text editor modifying the .ork XML file directly.

integrity.description: The simulation results in the report match the actual simulation run.
integrity.visual_evidence: The peak altitude and stability margin written in the report should match the values visible in the OpenRocket GUI.

integrity.description: The report contains specific, plausible values derived from the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The report should not contain placeholder text like '[Insert Altitude Here]' but actual numbers obtained from the OpenRocket simulation.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target payload tube must have a diameter >= 48mm (radius >= 24mm) and length >= 95mm to pass tolerances. The mass component must be between 48g and 52g. The modified rocket must be saved as /home/ga/Documents/rockets/hammerhead_rocket.ork and the report as /home/ga/Documents/exports/hammerhead_report.txt. A score of 60 points is required to pass.
